[[commons:Category:757 in Japan]] [[ja:Category:757年の日本]] [[ko:Category:757년 일본]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tachibana no Naramaro Rebellion]] {{wikidata link|Q18988034}} [[Category:757 by country]] [[Category:757 in Asia]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Japan in the 750s]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:Years in Japan]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
